params.name: return_score
params.description: Return a synchronous Sift Score in the response.

params.name: return_workflow_status
params.description: Return synchronous Workflow status in the response.

params.name: abuse_types
params.description: Comma-separated abuse types (payment_abuse, content_abuse, account_takeover, account_abuse, promotion_abuse, legacy).

items.docs:
Submit an event to Sift for fraud and abuse scoring. The `$type` field selects
the reserved event type (for example, `$create_account`, `$create_order`,
`$transaction`, `$login`, `$chargeback`, `$verification`). Pass
`return_score=true` to receive a synchronous Sift Score in the response.
